positive: A geometrically stylized depiction of a meditating silhouette surrounded by cosmic elements. The main figure is centered, rendered with clean, thick linework. Surrounding elements include highly detailed, abstract constellations, delicate nebula swirls, and stylized crescent moons, all interwoven with flowing, organic mandalas. The color palette should be deep indigo, burnt orange, emerald green, and stark gold accents, maintaining high contrast. The style should evoke Art Deco geometry merged with celestial vaporwave aesthetics, resembling a detailed woodblock print or a stylized tattoo design, perfectly isolated on a solid background suitable for textile printing. Clean edges, strong contrast, symmetry.
negative: text, writing, logo, signature, copyright, trademark, words, watermark, poor anatomy, malformed, extra limbs, blurry, noisy, jpeg artifacts, low detail, grain, monochrome, grayscale
